description: Energy Engineering is an active bi-monthly magazine first published in 1904 under the title The Heating and Ventilating Magazine.  Initially focusing on the engineering of heating and ventilating systems for a variety of buildings, including school houses and greenhouses, it has expanded over time and now includes articles on products, processes, insights, innovations and renewable energy in relation to engineering.  Energy Engineering went through a series of name changes, in 1929 it shortened its name to Heating and Ventilating then in 1955 it became Air Conditioning Heating and Ventilating which was abbreviated to ACHV in 1965. In 1969 it became known as Building Systems Design and finally settled on Energy Engineering in 1979. The aim of the journal is for researchers, engineers, scientists and technologists to present their research and findings on a variety of energy topics. It now has a particular focus on renewable energy, energy sustainability, clean energy, environmental systems and smart energy, it includes discussion on biofuels, alternatives to fossil fuels and nuclear energy.  The Internet Archive Collection contains microfilm published between 1904 and 2013 Energy Engineering can be found online: https://www.tandfonline.com/loi/uene20 ISSN is 0199-8595
subject: Heating, Plumbing And Refrigeration
title: Energy Engineering
